programme.title: iCRIME With Elizabeth Vargas
programme.sub-title: Man Slaps Phoenix Cop During Traffic Stop; Man Plows Into Food Trucks
programme.desc: Crimes from across the country that have been captured by ordinary people on their smartphones; stories of victims, witnesses, law enforcement and the videographers themselves.

programme.desc: A look at the stories, rivalries and dreams driving nations towards soccer's ultimate prize, the FIFA World Cup trophy.

programme.title: In Depth With Graham Bensinger
programme.desc: Graham profiles master craftsman Jesse James; the West Coast Choppers founder discusses his shift from motorcycle legend to world-class gunsmith; he also reflects on childhood trauma, his five failed marriages, and finding stability with wife Alina.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Coffee With America
programme.desc: The rise of pistachio-inspired treats; refreshing seasonal sips; easy ways to elevate at-home gatherings; resources for Parkinson's patients and families; how to care for and protect your jewelry; simple and stress-free ideas for celebrating Mother's Day; travel inspiration as America's 250th anniversary approaches; the growing shortage of primary care doctors and what it means for access to care.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: Jack Hibbs -- Real Life
programme.desc: It's my desire that through Jesus Christ, you will know real life!

programme.title: FOX News Sunday
programme.desc: Secretary of Homeland Securit Markwayne Mullin; Supreme Court Justice Neil Gorsuch; panel discussion with Kellyanne Conway, Susan Page, Karl Rove and Juan Williams.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Mercy Ships
programme.desc: Mercy Ship's crew of world class medical volunteers sail across the globe providing lifesaving surgeries to those with nowhere else to turn.

programme.desc: Transforming lives and bringing smiles to children around the world.

programme.title: Second Chance Pets
programme.desc: A dog named Huck needs a prosthetic; a doberman pincher named Fudge needs a brace.

programme.title: Super Animals
programme.desc: The architectural skills of termites; the impressive armor of the three-banded armadillo; the unique adaptations of the flamingo.

programme.title: Live: United Football League
programme.desc: The Storm host the Stallions in Week 6. Orlando looks to sweep the season series following a 16-0 shutout win over Birmingham on April 18. Orlando's quarterback Jack Plummer has 996 passing yards and eight touchdowns in this campaign.

programme.title: Live: FOX 11 Sports Wrap
programme.desc: Full, uncut interviews with some of the big names in Sports.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Shark attacks have affected the lives of professional surfers Bethany Hamilton and Mick Fanning, while Kelly Slater remains the undisputed GOAT and Stephanie Gilmore astonished the world in 2022.

programme.title: Sherri
programme.desc: Actress, comic and Emmy Award-winning longtime co-host of "The View" Sherri Shepherd appears before a live audience with a daily dose of pop culture, comedy, conversations and daytime talk staples, including celebrity and human-interest interviews.

programme.title: The Jennifer Hudson Show
programme.desc: Comic Leslie Jones stops by to talk about her latest special, "Leslie Jones: Life Part 2," and her nationwide tour; Joel and Cesar Cruz, proud dads to three adopted children, share their inspiring foster-to-forever journey.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less Live
programme.sub-title: Quick Wit Throwdown: Melissa Peterman vs. Ross Mathews
programme.desc: Quick wit meets big laughs as Melissa Peterman takes on Ross Mathews live -- every word counts.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: When Matt Landry suddenly disappears, everyone suspects he is in danger; a violent bank robbery leaves police wondering if there is a connection.

programme.title: TMZ Live
programme.desc: A candid look at how the gossip site operates, bringing viewers into the site's newsroom, where the daily chats take place; viewers present their opinions on the featured topics through social media, phone calls and video chat.
